strengths: 6+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and a custom D test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited demonstrated Kotlin/Java depth; Java appears only in passing on older roles
No clear evidence of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) breadth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer with well-aligned TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work matching the role's internal automation focus. Testing discipline and architecture exposure are strong. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js usage and thin Kotlin/Java depth, but the overall stack and seniority profile map closely to the position.
